underlying_goal: Document, verify, and optimize the Gen3 DLP rule engine—keeping a Confluence design doc accurate against the codebase, implementing performance optimizations, and resolving session cost-tracking confusion
friction_detail: A workflow agent gutted the Confluence design doc removing all diagrams, requiring a manual restore from a prior good version.
brief_summary: User wanted the Gen3 rule engine design doc kept accurate, perf optimizations implemented/tested, and session cost clarified; they got accurate explanations and working code despite one doc-overwrite incident that was recovered.
